curation.synopsis: Before he became the hero of Armageddon, Sebastian Yarrick was a freshly commissioned officer from the schola progenium, sent to the storm-wracked world of Mistral under the watchful eye of his mentor, Lord Commissar Rasp. Mistral is a place where rival barons have schemed for power since time immemorial, and where Imperial truth is rarely clear-cut. As open war engulfs the planet, Yarrick is drawn into a tangle of conspiracy that turns allies into enemies and forces strange bargains - with hidden chaos cults, the fervent Sisters of Battle and clandestine inquisitors all standing between the young commissar and his duty. The first Yarrick novel is a tense political thriller about faith, corruption and the making of a legend.
